name: Shadow-Touched
description: Your exposure to the Shadowfell's magic grants you a +1 bonus to Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma (maximum of 20). You learn the Invisibility spell and one 1st-level spell of your choice from the Illusion or Necromancy school. You can cast each of these spells once without expending a spell slot, regaining the ability to do so when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast these spells using spell slots you have of the appropriate level. The spellcasting ability for these spells is the ability increased by this feat.
